content:
No need to download Thunderbird again. You just have to find turn the feature on...

At the top of then left-hand Folders Pane, you will see a header bar with three little dots on the right. Clicking that reveals a context menu, one of its options is Folder Modes, and one it its options is Unified Folders.

See the attached image.
creator: rednoise

content:
Go to the setting <Account Settings | (the account in question) | Server Settings | When I delete a message> and see what "Move to this folder" is set for.

Also try using the Search feature to find one of the recent missing messages.

content: You should mention that you're using Cardbook rather than the integrated Address Book. Look at the Cardbook Preferences setting <General | Integration in Thunderbird> and make sure the options are set up similar to mine, especially "Unique Source for Contacts" (see attached image)...
creator: rednoise

content:
Is this the add-on you're referring to?

https://addons.thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/addon/zoom-meetings-for-thunderbird/

Support for add-ons should be directed to its developer. In this case, I notice it's almost brand new, that it's the developer's first and only project, that it has a single one-star review that says it doesn't work and that the author's email link is dead, and that the link to the project page is dead. Not very encouraging!

Again, your best bet is to try to track down the developer.
creator: rednoise
